title: Murderwing and Celestian Insidiants
description: Shadowhunt teams [Murderwing](/killteams/CHAOS-MW) and [Celestian Insidiants](/killteams/IMP-CI) are loaded!

title: Homebrew Teams - Voting and Filtering
description: We added voting and filtering tools to the [Homebrew](/killteams?tab=homebrew) list. Go and vote for your favorites!

title: XV26 Stealth Battlesuits and Wolf Scouts, plus balance updates for Nov 2025
description: Loaded new Killteams [XV26 Stealth Battlesuits](/killteams/TAU-XV26) and [Wolf Scouts](/killteams/IMP-WS)! Plus, all Nov 2025 balance updates and errata have been applied.

title: WCW Balance Updates + Old CritOps
description: WCW Balance Updates have been applied to all teams, and you can now pick from 2024 or 2025 CritOps and TacOps in [Settings](/tools)

title: Make your own Homebrew Teams
description: You can now build your own Homebrew teams! From your [account](/me) page, you'll see a new button "New Homebrew" which will give you a new set of screens to use to build homebrew teams.

title: Deathwatch and Canoptek Circle, plus new TacOps and CritOps
description: Loaded new Killteams [Deathwatch Veterans](/killteams/IMP-DW) and [Canoptek Circle](/killteams/NEC-CAN) and updated TacOps and CritOps.

title: Injured Operatives
description: Injured Operatives now have their MOVE and weapons' HIT values adjusted.

title: Added CritOps + Roster Printing
description: All the missing CritOps are now loaded, and you can now print your rosters!

title: Roster Portraits
description: You can now add, edit, and delete roster portraits. To edit a roster portrait, just edit your Roster and go to the "Portrait" tab.

title: Spotlight, roster descriptions and display improvements
description: Killteam pages now show their spotlighted rosters, and you can now edit your roster descriptions as markdown and rosters now show their description and their portrait (or the killteam's portrait) in the background.

title: V4 is LIVE!
description: V4 is now LIVE! If you need access to the old KTDash (for kt21 teams for example), go to [old.ktdash.app](https://old.ktdash.app).

title: Persistent Ploys, Roster Share Menu, UI tweaks
description: Added support for selecting active ploys! They automatically clear when moving to a new Turn or resetting the roster. Added a new "Share" menu on your rosters (including QR code and roster link). Also a bunch of UI tweaks for ease of use.

title: Select operatives (Deploy/reserve)
description: Added support for selecting Operatives to deploy! The menu now has an option to "Deploy" or "Reserve" your operatives. Reserve operatives are collapsed and pushed to the bottom of the roster view in their own section.

title: Crit/Tac/Kill Ops
description: You can now select and track your CritOps, TacOps, and KillOps on your roster.

title: Jul 2025 Balance Dataslate
description: All July 2025 balance dataslate updates have been applied.

title: Fixes
description: Add universal equipment + lots of fixes throughout including Killteam composition, missing or incorrect weapon rules, and others.

title: Killteam Page Updates, auto-apply mods
description: Added killteam composition, equipment, and ploys to the killteam pages. Added support for mods on weapons and operatives (e.g. Mark of Chaos or Custom Bolt Carbine).
